hero.title: Your class, but with superpowers
hero.subtitle: Your students actually learn. You stop grading at 2am.

features.heading: Here's how the magic works
features.variations_desc: We generate unique versions of each task. Copying just doesn't work anymore (sorry not sorry).
features.guided_desc: No giving away answers. We guide you with hints so you get there on your own. Like a great teacher, but with infinite patience.
features.insights_desc: Who's doing well, who needs a hand, which topics are tough. All crystal clear, no grading stack required.

benefits.heading: Everyone wins. For real.
benefits.teacher_1: No more drowning in homework piles
benefits.teacher_3: Tell apart who gets it from who copies
benefits.student_1: Learn at your own pace, zero pressure
benefits.student_2: Ask for help without feeling judged
benefits.institution_1: Real results, not just pretty grades
benefits.institution_2: Clear data by group and by topic
benefits.institution_3: Set up in days, not months

startFree.heading: Go on, it's free
startFree.description: Free free. Really. No tricks. Your first task? Done in 5 minutes.

footer.tagline: Made with love for those who teach and learn.
